name: opencode-processing-skills
description: Skills, agents, and templates for structured documentation, planning, implementation, testing, and release workflows with AI coding agents.
author: Martin Klein

skills.name: smart-start
skills.description: Intelligent session bootstrap with auto-detection

skills.name: validate-docs
skills.description: Git-based documentation staleness detection

skills.name: generate-docs
skills.description: Generate project documentation from codebase

skills.name: update-docs
skills.description: Update existing documentation after code changes

skills.name: generate-agents-md
skills.description: Generate project-specific AGENTS.md

skills.name: retrospective
skills.description: Reconstruct docs from git history

skills.name: onboard-developer
skills.description: Generate developer onboarding guide

skills.name: create-plan
skills.description: Create structured implementation plans

skills.name: update-plan
skills.description: Update plan status and phase transitions

skills.name: resume-plan
skills.description: Bootstrap session for plan continuation

skills.name: generate-handover
skills.description: Generate session handover documents

skills.name: analyze-impact
skills.description: Pre-implementation impact analysis

skills.name: cross-repo-plan
skills.description: Multi-repository plan coordination

skills.name: implement-phase
skills.description: Execute plan phases step by step with test verification

skills.name: scaffold
skills.description: Generate convention-aware boilerplate for new modules

skills.name: refactor
skills.description: Safe refactoring with test verification before and after

skills.name: fix-ci
skills.description: Diagnose and fix CI pipeline failures

skills.name: add-tests
skills.description: Generate tests matching project conventions

skills.name: test-strategy
skills.description: Generate test strategy with coverage gap analysis

skills.name: coverage-check
skills.description: Lightweight test coverage heuristic via file matching

skills.name: diff-review
skills.description: Structured code review with impact assessment

skills.name: pr-ready
skills.description: Prepare branch for PR with checks and description

skills.name: debug-assist
skills.description: Structured debugging with hypothesis logging

skills.name: context-compress
skills.description: Mid-session context compression to save tokens

skills.name: adr-create
skills.description: Create Architecture Decision Records

skills.name: release-notes
skills.description: Generate release notes from git log

skills.name: ci-setup
skills.description: Generate CI pipeline tailored to project stack

skills.name: dependency-audit
skills.description: Audit dependencies for staleness and vulnerabilities
